mapper.select:
select * from t_media a
where a.zid=#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into t_media ( zid, zcode, zname, zaddress, zlinkman, ztel, zpassword, zunitcode, zsortindex )values( #{zid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zlinkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ztel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zpassword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zunitcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zsortindex,jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
